name: Transformer Block
description: LLaMA-style transformer block: RMSNorm -> RoPE Attention -> Residual -> RMSNorm -> SwiGLU FFN -> Residual
code:
# === Transformer Block {{_id}} ===
_tb{{_id}}_d = {{dim}}
_tb{{_id}}_h = {{n_heads}}
_tb{{_id}}_dk = _tb{{_id}}_d // _tb{{_id}}_h
_tb{{_id}}_hd = {{hidden_dim}}
#
# -- Attention Norm --
_tb{{_id}}_an_w = np.ones(_tb{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_tb{{_id}}_normed = {{input}} * (1.0 / np.sqrt(np.mean({{input}} ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + {{eps}})) * _tb{{_id}}_an_w
#
# -- RoPE Multi-Head Attention --
_tb{{_id}}_wq = np.random.randn(_tb{{_id}}_d, _tb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_tb{{_id}}_wk = np.random.randn(_tb{{_id}}_d, _tb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_tb{{_id}}_wv = np.random.randn(_tb{{_id}}_d, _tb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_tb{{_id}}_wo = np.random.randn(_tb{{_id}}_d, _tb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_tb{{_id}}_bs, _tb{{_id}}_sl, _ = _tb{{_id}}_normed.shape
_tb{{_id}}_q = np.matmul(_tb{{_id}}_normed, _tb{{_id}}_wq.T).reshape(_tb{{_id}}_bs, _tb{{_id}}_sl, _tb{{_id}}_h, _tb{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_tb{{_id}}_k = np.matmul(_tb{{_id}}_normed, _tb{{_id}}_wk.T).reshape(_tb{{_id}}_bs, _tb{{_id}}_sl, _tb{{_id}}_h, _tb{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_tb{{_id}}_v = np.matmul(_tb{{_id}}_normed, _tb{{_id}}_wv.T).reshape(_tb{{_id}}_bs, _tb{{_id}}_sl, _tb{{_id}}_h, _tb{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_tb{{_id}}_freqs = 1.0 / ({{theta}} ** (np.arange(0, _tb{{_id}}_dk, 2, dtype=np.float32) / _tb{{_id}}_dk))
_tb{{_id}}_pos = np.arange(_tb{{_id}}_sl, dtype=np.float32)
_tb{{_id}}_ang = np.outer(_tb{{_id}}_pos, _tb{{_id}}_freqs)
_tb{{_id}}_cos = np.cos(_tb{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_tb{{_id}}_sin = np.sin(_tb{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_tb{{_id}}_qr = np.zeros_like(_tb{{_id}}_q)
_tb{{_id}}_qr[..., 0::2] = _tb{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _tb{{_id}}_cos - _tb{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _tb{{_id}}_sin
_tb{{_id}}_qr[..., 1::2] = _tb{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _tb{{_id}}_sin + _tb{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _tb{{_id}}_cos
_tb{{_id}}_kr = np.zeros_like(_tb{{_id}}_k)
_tb{{_id}}_kr[..., 0::2] = _tb{{_id}}_k[..., 0::2] * _tb{{_id}}_cos - _tb{{_id}}_k[..., 1::2] * _tb{{_id}}_sin
_tb{{_id}}_kr[..., 1::2] = _tb{{_id}}_k[..., 0::2] * _tb{{_id}}_sin + _tb{{_id}}_k[..., 1::2] * _tb{{_id}}_cos
_tb{{_id}}_sc = np.matmul(_tb{{_id}}_qr, _tb{{_id}}_kr.transpose(0, 1, 3, 2)) / np.sqrt(_tb{{_id}}_dk)
if {{mask}} is not None:
    _tb{{_id}}_sc = np.where({{mask}} == 0, -1e9, _tb{{_id}}_sc)
_tb{{_id}}_ex = np.exp(_tb{{_id}}_sc - np.max(_tb{{_id}}_sc, axis=-1, keepdims=True))
_tb{{_id}}_aw = _tb{{_id}}_ex / np.sum(_tb{{_id}}_ex, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_tb{{_id}}_av = np.matmul(_tb{{_id}}_aw, _tb{{_id}}_v)
_tb{{_id}}_attn_out = np.matmul(_tb{{_id}}_av.transpose(0, 2, 1, 3).reshape(_tb{{_id}}_bs, _tb{{_id}}_sl, _tb{{_id}}_d), _tb{{_id}}_wo.T)
#
# -- Residual 1 --
_tb{{_id}}_res1 = {{input}} + _tb{{_id}}_attn_out
#
# -- FFN Norm --
_tb{{_id}}_fn_w = np.ones(_tb{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_tb{{_id}}_fn = _tb{{_id}}_res1 * (1.0 / np.sqrt(np.mean(_tb{{_id}}_res1 ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + {{eps}})) * _tb{{_id}}_fn_w
#
# -- SwiGLU FFN --
_tb{{_id}}_wg = np.random.randn(_tb{{_id}}_hd, _tb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_tb{{_id}}_wu = np.random.randn(_tb{{_id}}_hd, _tb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_tb{{_id}}_wd = np.random.randn(_tb{{_id}}_d, _tb{{_id}}_hd).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_tb{{_id}}_gate = np.matmul(_tb{{_id}}_fn, _tb{{_id}}_wg.T)
_tb{{_id}}_up = np.matmul(_tb{{_id}}_fn, _tb{{_id}}_wu.T)
_tb{{_id}}_silu = _tb{{_id}}_gate * (1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_tb{{_id}}_gate)))
_tb{{_id}}_ffn_out = np.matmul(_tb{{_id}}_silu * _tb{{_id}}_up, _tb{{_id}}_wd.T)
#
# -- Residual 2 --
{{output}} = _tb{{_id}}_res1 + _tb{{_id}}_ffn_out

graph.description: Transformer block decomposed into molecular components
